text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her resolve thus renewed, Narita Taishin and I set
our sights on the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An injury forces Winning Ticket to pull out of the
race, leaving Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide to
battle it out, one-on-one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will Narita Taishin's powerful finishing sprint win?
Or will Biwa Hayahide's winning equation bring
her to victory?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtain is set to rise on the tense battle
between the two racers.
